name: @tacet/tee-runtime
description: Tacet TEE Noise endpoint — terminates Noise over WebSocket, forwards to local vLLM

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
